meta.title: Dat Nguyen — Web Developer
meta.description: Nguyen Thanh Dat — Web Developer with 5+ years of experience in Vue, React, Nuxt, and Next. Based in Da Nang, Vietnam.

hero.summary: Primarily a frontend developer with 5+ years building UIs in Vue, React, Nuxt, and Next — strong on UI/UX, components, and responsive product screens. Also hands-on with Java/Spring Boot and APIs from real projects, with a clear path toward fullstack delivery.

projects.label: Featured work
projects.title: Projects that shaped the craft
projects.lead: Selected product, channel, landing, and backend work — frontend-led delivery with fullstack exposure.

profile.caption: Nguyen Thanh Dat — frontend-focused web developer (Vue / React / Nuxt / Next), expanding toward fullstack with Spring Boot and API work.
profile.education: Education: Informatics Teacher Education — The University of Danang, University of Education.
profile.title: Frontend craft, fullstack ambition

about.label: About
about.title: Frontend first, fullstack direction
about.intro: Since 2020 I have shipped mostly on the frontend — design to production UI, components, and client flows — while picking up backend work on real products. Frontend is the core strength; fullstack is the direction.
about.lookingFor: Open to frontend-heavy roles with room to grow as a fullstack developer — modern teams, solid product craft, and AI-assisted workflows.

objective.title: Objective
objective.text: Keep shipping excellent frontend experiences while deepening backend skills to operate confidently as a fullstack developer.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Turn designs into fast, responsive interfaces people enjoy — with clean components, solid UX, and enough API/backend fluency to own features end-to-end when needed.

approach.title: Approach
approach.text: Frontend-first by default; jump into Java/Spring Boot or mobile when the product needs full-feature ownership across the stack.

skills.label: Technical stack
skills.title: Frontend first — fullstack in progress
skills.lead: Core strength on the UI side; backend skills from real FPT/Permate work as the path toward fullstack.
skills.frontendLead: Main craft — UI systems, responsive layouts, and product screens.
skills.backendLead: Growing fullstack path — APIs and services from FPT/Permate and real delivery work.
skills.softSkills: Teamwork · Attention to detail · Fast learner · Deadline-driven · Responsible ownership · Clear communication

career.label: Career notes
career.title: Places and projects along the way
career.lead: Instead of fake testimonials — real teams and products from the CV timeline.

contact.label: Visit / reach out
contact.title: Let’s talk about the next build
contact.lead: Open to frontend-heavy roles with a fullstack growth path. Prefer email for opportunities.
contact.addressValue: Hoa Xuan, Cam Le, Da Nang

personal.label: Side builds
personal.title: Personal projects
personal.lead: Experiments and side products — each with a core idea, stack, demo, and GitHub source.

permate.description: Affiliate marketing platform — main ownership on web UI/UX from designs and client flows, plus API wiring, code review, backend support when needed, and Flutter app features for the mobile product on a 20-person team.

lgu.description: Digital services channel for end users. Built shared components, screens from a base library, API integrations, unit tests, and coordinated with BA/BrSE/clients on a team of 11.

dsh.description: Marketing landing pages for a blockchain product — pages, components, business logic, and full responsive delivery with design-system tooling.

cinvest.description: Landing page and page/component implementation with React and Next.js in a team of four.

vf-framework.description: Migrated legacy MyBatis data flows to Spring Boot JPA while keeping results aligned with the existing system — API and persistence work on a Java backend modernization track.

survey.description: React Native app for factory worker surveys, health evaluations, blogs, and Q&A — Figma-driven UI with backend coordination and bug fixing.

chat.label: Meet Dat AI
chat.title: Meet Dat AI — ask him anything
chat.lead: A small interactive corner: ask about experience, skills, and how to reach Dat. Daily question limits keep answers short and fun.
chat.intro: Want a quick, light “interview” with Dat? Tap below — first tell me who you are.
chat.banned: Your chat access was locked for inappropriate language. Please keep things respectful.
chat.namePrompt: Before we start, tell me your name.
chat.anonymousTease: Hello anonymous! Still want to drop a name — I’ll keep it secret forever.
chat.quotaDone: You’ve hit today’s question limit — come back tomorrow.

suggestions.question: What is Dat’s current role?
suggestions.answer: Dat is a Developer at Permate Global (since August 2023), working on the Permate affiliate marketing platform with Vue, Nuxt, and Flutter — focused on UI/UX, APIs, and team collaboration.

suggestions.question: How many years of experience does he have?
suggestions.answer: Dat has 5+ years of experience building modern, responsive web applications, starting from internships at NCCSOFT in 2020 through roles at FPT Software, freelance work, and Permate Global.

suggestions.question: What tech stack does he use most?
suggestions.answer: He works primarily with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Vue.js, React, Nuxt.js, and Next.js. He also has exposure to React Native, Flutter, Spring Boot, and REST APIs.

suggestions.question: Where is he based?
suggestions.answer: Dat is based in Hoa Xuan, Cam Le, Da Nang, Vietnam.

suggestions.question: How can I contact him?
suggestions.answer: You can reach Dat at nguyenthanhdat1302{'@'}gmail.com, phone 0935 467 108, or Facebook at facebook.com/thanhdat130298.

my-portfolio.name: My Portfolio
my-portfolio.idea: A Nuxt portfolio with CV sections, light/dark + EN/VI, and an on-page Meet Dat AI chat grounded on portfolio data.

interview-qa.name: Interview Q&A
interview-qa.idea: Offline-friendly frontend interview question bank (~450 items) for focused practice without needing a live server.

english-fe.name: English App
english-fe.idea: Frontend for a language/translation learning flow — practice UI with a linked backend API.
english-fe.note: Needs the Backend server running first, so the demo can take a while to start / warm up.

template-invitation.name: Invitation Template
template-invitation.idea: Reusable digital invitation template — mobile-first layout ready to customize for events.
